Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition of 60% of Silver Reef Robotics Limited by Lumen Harbor Holdings Limited (a Hong Kong listed company on Harbour Bay Exchange) for an aggregate consideration of HKD 420,000,000, subject to the Hong Kong Listing Rules (Chapter 14 equivalent) and the Hong Kong Codes on Takeovers and Mergers.
Structure: Share purchase with a put/call option for the remaining 40% after 24 months; completion conditional on “inside information” handling under the Securities and Futures Ordinance (SFO) Part XIVA and any necessary shareholder approval for a major transaction.
Financing: Bridge facility of HKD 180,000,000 from Blue Cove Meridian Fund SPC – Lotus Cell, and vendor financing of HKD 60,000,000; remaining consideration in cash from internal resources, each drawdown subject to clean-team access protocols.
MNPI/cleansing: Specific information about Lumen Harbor Holdings Limited or Silver Reef Robotics Limited that is not generally known and would be price-material will be treated as inside information under SFO; recipients are wall-crossed and recorded on an insider list, and no dealing is permitted until a cleansing announcement is made on the Harbour Bay Exchange.
Diligence data handling: Virtual data room hosted in Osaka, Japan; cross-border transfer approved via Data Export Approval DE-2026-04 signed by the Chief Privacy Officer on 15 May 2026, with encryption, access logs, and field minimisation enabled.
DPA schedules: Schedule 2 (Employee Onboarding Forms) and Schedule 4 (Vendor Screening) require collection minimisation under PDPO (e.g., no full ID document copies unless AML law explicitly mandates), with retention markers of 24 months for rejected applicants and 7 years for successful hires’ core payroll data.
DSAR process: Any Data Subject Access Request will be acknowledged within 7 days and fulfilled within 40 days; contact privacy@lumenharbor.hk or +852 3900 1200; there are no outstanding DSARs as at the date of this term sheet (ticket DSAR-047 closed with disclosure log filed).
Consent withdrawal: Ms. Rowan Tse (HR Director) confirms that an employee’s consent for pre-employment background checks was withdrawn on 12 May 2026 and processing ceased immediately; related screening reports were erased on 16 May 2026 in accordance with Retention Schedule RS-HR-03.
Erasure/backups: Production erasure is immediate upon event closure, with backups overwritten on the next 30-day cycle; this statement reflects completed controls and does not indicate any pending deletions.
Employment data flows: Payroll and benefits processing by Jade Pagoda Services Limited (Shenzhen) under a Data Processing Addendum (DPA Ref: JPS-2026-01) with transfer impact assessment completed; onward transfers require case-by-case Data Export Approval and audit trails.
Compliance memo: Memo dated 18 May 2026 by Ms. Celeste Fong, Head of Legal, confirms PDPO compliance for diligence access and sets a contact window for query escalation to legal@lumenharbor.hk; this memo is for compliance documentation and is not a waiver of any rights.
Regulatory consents: Any announcement obligations under SFO Part XIVA and the listing rules of Harbour Bay Exchange will be coordinated by Mr. Aaron Lau (CFO), with draft disclosures pre-cleared by external counsel; the Takeovers Code applies only if control passes above 30%, which is not triggered by this tranche.
Closing conditions: No material adverse change; completion of KYC on vendors and funders; confirmation that no sanctioned jurisdictions are involved; data room to be archived with read-only access and a 12-month retention label applied, after which automatic disposal is triggered.
Policy-only control: The Parties maintain a policy that prohibits automated decision-making using personal data in M&A diligence; no such processing is planned or occurring in this transaction.
Negative assurance on transfers: No live cross-border transfers will occur post-signing without a fresh Data Export Approval, and as of the date hereof, none are pending beyond DE-2026-04.
Contacts: Primary commercial contact is Mr. Aaron Lau (CFO) at a.lau@lumenharbor.hk; privacy and DPA queries to privacy@lumenharbor.hk; deal counsel liaison at contracts@silverreef-robotics.com.
